_comment: SYNTHESIZED fixture, not a real capture. Replace with a scrubbed real payload when available. Covers renderable_type 2 (admin reply via admin_summary) and 24 (admin reply via entity) — both customer-visible, go to parts[] with is_admin=true.
title: Billing question

blocks.text: Thanks for reaching out! I've checked your account.
